titles.title: Like a Deer thirst for water

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Like a deer thirst for water My soul thirst for you Oh my God I thirst for you My soul it Thirst for you

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: As tears cried in anguish My heart cries for you Oh my God I cry to you My heart it cries to you

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When my soul is cast down There's new hope that I found and its you I remember the days you delivered me Safely through

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Like a well spring of water My praise I'll sing to you Oh my God I sing to you My praise I'll sing to you

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: When my soul is cast down There's new hope that I found and its you I remember the days you delivered me Safely through
